revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Librivox author/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Librivox author/doc]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Librivox author/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Librivox author/doc]]</includeonly>

#redirect[[:en:Template:Librivox author/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Librivox author/doc]]</includeonly>

{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{Uses Wikidata|P1899}} {{Lua|Module:EditAtWikidata}} == Usage == Unnamed parameters: : {{tlcw|{{BASEPAGENAME}} | SEARCH+TEXT }} : {{tlcw|{{BASEPAGENAME}} | SEARCH+TEXT | TITLE }} Named parameters: : {{tlcw|{{BASEPAGENAME}} | id{{=}} ID }} : {{tlcw|{{BASEPAGENAME}} | id{{=}} ID | title{{=}} TITLE }} Using [[Wikidata]] property {{Property|1899}}: : {{tlcw|{{BASEPAGENAME}} }} : {{tlcw|{{BASEPAGENAME}} | title{{=}} TITLE }} == Examples == === Unnamed parameters (search page) === ; Usage : * {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|Albert+Einstein|Albert Einstein}} ; Output :* {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|Albert+Einstein|Albert Einstein}} ; URL : [https://librivox.org/search?q=Albert+Einstein&search_form=advanced https://librivox.org/search?q={{Highlight|Albert+Einstein}}&search_form=advanced] === Named parameters (author page) === ; Usage : * {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|id=1035|title=Albert Einstein}} ; Output :* {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|id=1035|title=Albert Einstein}} ; URLs : [https://librivox.org/author/1035 https://librivox.org/author/{{Highlight|1035}}] === No parameters and no ID in Wikidata === ; Usage : * {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}}} ; Output :* {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}}} ==Notes== *Note the "+" sign replaces [space] in the first example. This leads to a search result page. To go direct to the author page, use the "id=" switch. *The optional "id=##" is for linking directly to authors page bypassing the search page. eg. http://librivox.org/author/1035 *See {{tl|Librivox book}} for individual books. ==See also== *[https://github.com/greencardamom/LV2WP LV2WP], code to map LibriVox author IDs to Wikipedia article names. *{{tl|Internet Archive author}} for [[Internet Archive]] *{{tl|Gutenberg author}} for [[Project Gutenberg]] {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Author and writer external link templates]] [[Category:External link templates using Wikidata]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{Uses Wikidata|P1899}} {{Lua|Module:EditAtWikidata}} == Usage == Unnamed parameters: : {{tlcw|{{BASEPAGENAME}} | SEARCH+TEXT }} : {{tlcw|{{BASEPAGENAME}} | SEARCH+TEXT | TITLE }} Named parameters: : {{tlcw|{{BASEPAGENAME}} | id{{=}} ID }} : {{tlcw|{{BASEPAGENAME}} | id{{=}} ID | title{{=}} TITLE }} Using [[Wikidata]] property {{Property|1899}}: : {{tlcw|{{BASEPAGENAME}} }} : {{tlcw|{{BASEPAGENAME}} | title{{=}} TITLE }} == Examples == === Unnamed parameters (search page) === ; Usage : * {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|Albert+Einstein|Albert Einstein}} ; Output :* {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|Albert+Einstein|Albert Einstein}} ; URL : [https://librivox.org/search?q=Albert+Einstein&search_form=advanced https://librivox.org/search?q={{Highlight|Albert+Einstein}}&search_form=advanced] === Named parameters (author page) === ; Usage : * {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|id=1035|title=Albert Einstein}} ; Output :* {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|id=1035|title=Albert Einstein}} ; URLs : [https://librivox.org/author/1035 https://librivox.org/author/{{Highlight|1035}}] === No parameters and no ID in Wikidata === ; Usage : * {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}}} ; Output :* {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}}} ==Notes== *Note the "+" sign replaces [space] in the first example. This leads to a search result page. To go direct to the author page, use the "id=" switch. *The optional "id=##" is for linking directly to authors page bypassing the search page. eg. http://librivox.org/author/1035 *See {{tl|Librivox book}} for individual books. ==See also== *[https://github.com/greencardamom/LV2WP LV2WP], code to map LibriVox author IDs to Wikipedia article names. *{{tl|Internet Archive author}} for [[:en:Internet Archive|Internet Archive]] *{{tl|Gutenberg author}} for [[Project Gutenberg]] {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Author and writer external link templates]] [[Category:External link templates using Wikidata]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki

This leads to a search result page. To go direct to the author page, use the "id=" switch. *The optional "id=##" is for linking directly to authors page bypassing the search page. eg. http://librivox.org/author/1035 *See {{tl|Librivox book}} for individual books. ==See also== *[https://github.com/greencardamom/LV2WP LV2WP], code to map LibriVox author IDs to Wikipedia article names. *{{tl|Internet Archive author}} for [[:en:Internet Archive|Internet Archive]] *{{tl|Gutenberg author}} for [[:en:Project Gutenberg|Project Gutenberg]] {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Author and writer external link templates]] [[Category:External link templates using Wikidata]] }}

This leads to a search result page. To go direct to the author page, use the "id=" switch. *The optional "id=##" is for linking directly to authors page bypassing the search page. eg. http://librivox.org/author/1035 *See {{tl|Librivox book}} for individual books. ==See also== *[https://github.com/greencardamom/LV2WP LV2WP], code to map LibriVox author IDs to Wikipedia article names. *{{tl|Internet Archive author}} for [[:en:Internet Archive|Internet Archive]] *{{tl|Gutenberg author}} for [[:en:Project Gutenberg|Project Gutenberg]] {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Author and writer external link templates]] [[Category:External link templates using Wikidata]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{Uses Wikidata|P1899}} {{Lua|Module:EditAtWikidata}} == Usage == Unnamed parameters: : {{tlcw|{{BASEPAGENAME}} | SEARCH+TEXT }} : {{tlcw|{{BASEPAGENAME}} | SEARCH+TEXT | TITLE }} Named parameters: : {{tlcw|{{BASEPAGENAME}} | id{{=}} ID }} : {{tlcw|{{BASEPAGENAME}} | id{{=}} ID | title{{=}} TITLE }} Using [[:en:Wikidata|Wikidata]] property {{Property|1899}}: : {{tlcw|{{BASEPAGENAME}} }} : {{tlcw|{{BASEPAGENAME}} | title{{=}} TITLE }} == Examples == === Unnamed parameters (search page) === ; Usage : * {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|Albert+Einstein|Albert Einstein}} ; Output :* {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|Albert+Einstein|Albert Einstein}} ; URL : [https://librivox.org/search?q=Albert+Einstein&search_form=advanced https://librivox.org/search?q={{Highlight|Albert+Einstein}}&search_form=advanced] === Named parameters (author page) === ; Usage : * {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|id=1035|title=Albert Einstein}} ; Output :* {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|id=1035|title=Albert Einstein}} ; URLs : [https://librivox.org/author/1035 https://librivox.org/author/{{Highlight|1035}}] === No parameters and no ID in Wikidata === ; Usage : * {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}}} ; Output :* {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}}} ==Notes== *Note the "+" sign replaces [space] in the first example. This leads to a search result page. To go direct to the author page, use the "id=" switch. *The optional "id=##" is for linking directly to authors page bypassing the search page. eg. http://librivox.org/author/1035 *See {{tl|Librivox book}} for individual books. ==See also== *[https://github.com/greencardamom/LV2WP LV2WP], code to map LibriVox author IDs to Wikipedia article names. *{{tl|Internet Archive author}} for [[:en:Internet Archive|Internet Archive]] *{{tl|Gutenberg author}} for [[:en:Project Gutenberg|Project Gutenberg]] {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Author and writer external link templates]] [[Category:External link templates using Wikidata]] }} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{Uses Wikidata|P1899}} {{Lua|Module:EditAtWikidata}} == Usage == Unnamed parameters: : {{tlcw|{{BASEPAGENAME}} | SEARCH+TEXT }} : {{tlcw|{{BASEPAGENAME}} | SEARCH+TEXT | TITLE }} Named parameters: : {{tlcw|{{BASEPAGENAME}} | id{{=}} ID }} : {{tlcw|{{BASEPAGENAME}} | id{{=}} ID | title{{=}} TITLE }} Using [[:en:Wikidata|Wikidata]] property {{Property|1899}}: : {{tlcw|{{BASEPAGENAME}} }} : {{tlcw|{{BASEPAGENAME}} | title{{=}} TITLE }} == Examples == === Unnamed parameters (search page) === ; Usage : * {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|Albert+Einstein|Albert Einstein}} ; Output :* {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|Albert+Einstein|Albert Einstein}} ; URL : [https://librivox.org/search?q=Albert+Einstein&search_form=advanced https://librivox.org/search?q={{Highlight|Albert+Einstein}}&search_form=advanced] === Named parameters (author page) === ; Usage : * {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|id=1035|title=Albert Einstein}} ; Output :* {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|id=1035|title=Albert Einstein}} ; URLs : [https://librivox.org/author/1035 https://librivox.org/author/{{Highlight|1035}}] === No parameters and no ID in Wikidata === ; Usage : * {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}}} ; Output :* {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}}} ==Notes== *Note the "+" sign replaces [space] in the first example. This leads to a search result page. To go direct to the author page, use the "id=" switch. *The optional "id=##" is for linking directly to authors page bypassing the search page. eg. http://librivox.org/author/1035 *See {{tl|Librivox book}} for individual books. ==See also== *[https://github.com/greencardamom/LV2WP LV2WP], code to map LibriVox author IDs to Wikipedia article names. *{{tl|Internet Archive author}} for [[:en:Internet Archive|Internet Archive]] *{{tl|Gutenberg author}} for [[:en:Project Gutenberg|Project Gutenberg]] {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Author and writer external link templates]] [[Category:External link templates using Wikidata]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{Uses Wikidata|P1899}} {{Lua|Module:EditAtWikidata}} == Usage == Unnamed parameters: : {{tlcw|{{BASEPAGENAME}} | SEARCH+TEXT }} : {{tlcw|{{BASEPAGENAME}} | SEARCH+TEXT | TITLE }} Named parameters: : {{tlcw|{{BASEPAGENAME}} | id{{=}} ID }} : {{tlcw|{{BASEPAGENAME}} | id{{=}} ID | title{{=}} TITLE }} Using [[:en:Wikidata|Wikidata]] property {{Property|1899}}: : {{tlcw|{{BASEPAGENAME}} }} : {{tlcw|{{BASEPAGENAME}} | title{{=}} TITLE }} == Examples == === Unnamed parameters (search page) === ; Usage : * {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|Albert+Einstein|Albert Einstein}} ; Output :* {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|Albert+Einstein|Albert Einstein}} ; URL : [https://librivox.org/search?q=Albert+Einstein&search_form=advanced https://librivox.org/search?q={{Highlight|Albert+Einstein}}&search_form=advanced] === Named parameters (author page) === ; Usage : * {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|id=1035|title=Albert Einstein}} ; Output :* {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|id=1035|title=Albert Einstein}} ; URLs : [https://librivox.org/author/1035 https://librivox.org/author/{{Highlight|1035}}] === No parameters and no ID in Wikidata === ; Usage : * {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}}} ; Output :* {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}}} ==Notes== *Note the "+" sign replaces [space] in the first example. This leads to a search result page. To go direct to the author page, use the "id=" switch. *The optional "id=##" is for linking directly to authors page bypassing the search page. eg. http://librivox.org/author/1035 *See {{tl|Librivox book}} for individual books. ==See also== *[https://github.com/greencardamom/LV2WP LV2WP], code to map LibriVox author IDs to Wikipedia article names. *{{tl|Internet Archive author}} for [[:en:Internet Archive|Internet Archive]] *{{tl|Gutenberg author}} for [[:en:Project Gutenberg|Project Gutenberg]] {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Author and writer external link templates]] [[Category:External link templates using Wikidata]] }} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23511227343|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{Uses Wikidata|P1899}} {{Lua|Module:EditAtWikidata}} == Usage == Unnamed parameters: : {{tlcw|{{BASEPAGENAME}} | SEARCH+TEXT }} : {{tlcw|{{BASEPAGENAME}} | SEARCH+TEXT | TITLE }} Named parameters: : {{tlcw|{{BASEPAGENAME}} | id{{=}} ID }} : {{tlcw|{{BASEPAGENAME}} | id{{=}} ID | title{{=}} TITLE }} Using [[:en:Wikidata|Wikidata]] property {{Property|1899}}: : {{tlcw|{{BASEPAGENAME}} }} : {{tlcw|{{BASEPAGENAME}} | title{{=}} TITLE }} == Examples == === Unnamed parameters (search page) === ; Usage : * {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|Albert+Einstein|Albert Einstein}} ; Output :* {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|Albert+Einstein|Albert Einstein}} ; URL : [https://librivox.org/search?q=Albert+Einstein&search_form=advanced https://librivox.org/search?q={{Highlight|Albert+Einstein}}&search_form=advanced] === Named parameters (author page) === ; Usage : * {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|id=1035|title=Albert Einstein}} ; Output :* {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|id=1035|title=Albert Einstein}} ; URLs : [https://librivox.org/author/1035 https://librivox.org/author/{{Highlight|1035}}] === No parameters and no ID in Wikidata === ; Usage : * {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}}} ; Output :* {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}}} ==Notes== *Note the "+" sign replaces [space] in the first example. This leads to a search result page. To go direct to the author page, use the "id=" switch. *The optional "id=##" is for linking directly to authors page bypassing the search page. eg. http://librivox.org/author/1035 *See {{tl|Librivox book}} for individual books. ==See also== *[https://github.com/greencardamom/LV2WP LV2WP], code to map LibriVox author IDs to Wikipedia article names. *{{tl|Internet Archive author}} for [[:en:Internet Archive|Internet Archive]] *{{tl|Gutenberg author}} for [[:en:Project Gutenberg|Project Gutenberg]] {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Author and writer external link templates]] [[Category:External link templates using Wikidata]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24947213578|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{Uses Wikidata|P1899}} {{Lua|Module:EditAtWikidata}} == Usage == Unnamed parameters: : {{tlcw|{{BASEPAGENAME}} | SEARCH+TEXT }} : {{tlcw|{{BASEPAGENAME}} | SEARCH+TEXT | TITLE }} Named parameters: : {{tlcw|{{BASEPAGENAME}} | id{{=}} ID }} : {{tlcw|{{BASEPAGENAME}} | id{{=}} ID | title{{=}} TITLE }} Using [[:en:Wikidata|Wikidata]] property {{Property|1899}}: : {{tlcw|{{BASEPAGENAME}} }} : {{tlcw|{{BASEPAGENAME}} | title{{=}} TITLE }} == Examples == === Unnamed parameters (search page) === ; Usage : * {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|Albert+Einstein|Albert Einstein}} ; Output :* {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|Albert+Einstein|Albert Einstein}} ; URL : [https://librivox.org/search?q=Albert+Einstein&search_form=advanced https://librivox.org/search?q={{Highlight|Albert+Einstein}}&search_form=advanced] === Named parameters (author page) === ; Usage : * {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|id=1035|title=Albert Einstein}} ; Output :* {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}|id=1035|title=Albert Einstein}} ; URLs : [https://librivox.org/author/1035 https://librivox.org/author/{{Highlight|1035}}] === No parameters and no ID in Wikidata === ; Usage : * {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}}} ; Output :* {{{{BASEPAGENAME}}}} ==Notes== *Note the "+" sign replaces [space] in the first example. This leads to a search result page. To go direct to the author page, use the "id=" switch. *The optional "id=##" is for linking directly to authors page bypassing the search page. eg. http://librivox.org/author/1035 *See {{tl|Librivox book}} for individual books. ==See also== *[https://github.com/greencardamom/LV2WP LV2WP], code to map LibriVox author IDs to Wikipedia article names. *{{tl|Internet Archive author}} for [[:en:Internet Archive|Internet Archive]] *{{tl|Gutenberg author}} for [[:en:Project Gutenberg|Project Gutenberg]] {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Author and writer external link templates]] [[Category:External link templates using Wikidata]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
